name: Salsa Chicken Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Chicken, boneless/skinless - cut into thin strips
1 1/2 cups Stir-fry veggies (carrots, broccoli, cauliflower, etc.) - cut into bite-sized pieces
1 can Kidney beans, rinse and drain
3/4 cup Salsa, yours or store bought
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add chicken, onion, and garlic. Stir-fry for 3 minutes.
3. Add the vegetable mixture and chili powder. Stir-fry for 6-8 minutes, or until vegetables are tender-crisp.
4. Add beans, salsa, and water. Heat through.
5. Serve over hot cooked rice. Note: Salsa should be a thick, saucy style.
